page_metadata.biotools__summary: A software tool for a simple qualitative comparison of super-resolution optical fluctuation imaging (SOFI) images under simulated conditions considering parameters of the microscope setup and essential properties of the biological sample.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: A software tool for a simple qualitative comparison of super-resolution optical fluctuation imaging (SOFI) images under simulated conditions considering parameters of the microscope setup and essential properties of the biological sample.
